items.title: 5 pm came and went, no option picked up and Jonathan Mogbo is no longer a Raptor
items.author: Doug Smith
items.body_excerpt: 5 pm came and went, no option picked up and Jonathan Mogbo is no longer a Raptor

items.title: Raptors are declining the team option on Jonathan Mogbo for 2026-27, am told.
items.author: Blake Murphy
items.body_excerpt:
Raptors are declining the team option on Jonathan Mogbo for 2026-27, am told.

Roundup:

*Shead, Jackson-Davis options picked up
*Mogbo option declined
*Mamukelashvili declined his option

*Martin RFA qualifying offer

*Hepburn re-signed 2-way deal

*Battle deal guarantees July 1

items.title: I hope RJ Barrett, Immanuel Quickley and the pick that became Jonathan Mogbo all have wonderful weekends
items.author: Sam DiGiovanni
items.body_excerpt: I hope RJ Barrett, Immanuel Quickley and the pick that became Jonathan Mogbo all have wonderful weekends
